criteria_verification.evidence: Created tests/integration/test_mode_c_smoke_e2e.py with three top-level test classes (TestEmptyInitialReviewTerminal, TestFixTasksNoCommitsTerminal, TestFixTasksWithCommitsReachesPRReview) each driving a Mode C build through the supervisor and asserting the terminal shape. Harness uses real ModeCCyclePlanner + ModeCTerminalHandler against in-memory dispatcher fakes.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestEmptyInitialReviewTerminal contains three tests: test_empty_review_reaches_clean_review_terminal asserts TurnOutcome.TERMINAL with 'clean-review' in rationale; test_empty_review_does_not_dispatch_task_work asserts only one /task-review dispatch and zero /task-work dispatches; test_empty_review_records_no_pr_url asserts pr_review_gate.submissions == [] and zero recorded pull_request_url values on chronology rows.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestFixTasksNoCommitsTerminal scripts review_outcomes=[ReviewOutcome(('FIX-1','FIX-2','FIX-3')), ReviewOutcome(())] with commit_count=0; asserts three /task-work dispatches with sorted ids matching FIX-1/2/3, TurnOutcome.TERMINAL, 'clean-review' rationale, and pr_review_gate.submissions == [].

criteria_verification.evidence: TestStageHistoryShape::test_task_review_precedes_every_task_work_it_produced walks pipeline.stage_log.rows and asserts the first row is TASK_REVIEW, then iterates and asserts every TASK_WORK row has last_review_idx_seen != None and < its own index.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestStageHistoryShape::test_each_task_work_references_exactly_one_fix_task_id asserts each work row has non-None fix_task_id and details['fix_task_id'] mirrors the row-level field. PlannedSubprocessDispatcher also raises AssertionError if TASK_WORK is dispatched without a FixTaskRef, providing belt-and-braces enforcement.

Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)

rationale: All quality gates passed. Tests not required for this task type. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 370 chars provided.
